security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Private, offline QR scanning from your screen
bundle.longDescription: QRForge is a tray-first desktop utility that scans QR codes directly from the visible screen without uploads or screenshot files.
